headline: RTX's Raytheon awarded $515 million contract for SPY-6 family of radars
summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has been awarded a $515 million contract from the U.S. Navy for the SPY-6 family of radars. The contract is a follow-on to the Integration and Production Support contract, which was awarded in June 2025, and includes upgrading Flight IIA destroyers with the SPY-6(V)4 variant.

headline: Honeywell Aerospace CEO on Q2 spinoff: The biggest unlock for us will be around capital allocation
